MODULE: cosmos.integration.agent_interface
FILE: cosmos/integration/agent_interface.py (29 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Agent Interface.

"Hello, fellow machine!"

This module allows other AI agents (like Antigravity) to communicate with cosmos
via a standardized high-level API.

CLASSES:
- AgentInterface
  Methods: async def query_knowledge(self, query: str)
  Methods: async def inject_thought(self, content: str)
  Methods: async def request_task(self, task_description: str)
